evals.prompt: Write INVESTIGATIVNA SPRAVA for YEMANITY s.r.o. from structured findings data
Write broad scan report for 2026-03-01 to 2026-03-07
Write deep dive for DREVEX from minimal Phase 1-2 data
Profile YEMANITY s.r.o. (ICO 55002072) using db phase only

assertions.description: Output is valid JSON matching the supplier-profiler output schema
Profile contains all 5 YEMANITY contracts findable by ICO (IDs 11889441, 12036751, 12088132, 12058696, 12075436). Contract 12059873 has empty dodavatel_ico and is not expected.
Flags array contains nace_mismatch entries
Flags array contains micro_supplier entries
Extractions include signatory data (Jan Sutiak appears)
Profile section populated with data from ruz_entities (NACE, founding date, size)
Summary includes total_contracts, total_value, flag_count, and key_flags

evals.prompt: Profile DREVEX s.r.o. (ICO 36835463) using db + finstat phases

assertions.description: Output is valid JSON matching the supplier-profiler output schema
Flags array contains threshold_gaming flag (on contract 11696268, the dodatok to 11353827)
All contracts are from Obec Liptovske Sliace (ICO 00315427)
Agent attempted to fetch finstat.sk/36835463 (may succeed or fail gracefully)
Financial section is present with data from FinStat or ruz_equity, or marked not_available

evals.prompt: Map YEMANITY s.r.o. (ICO 55002072) corporate network using foaf phase only, shallow depth. Known signatories: Jan Sutiak, Filip Sobol. Buyer: Ekonomicka univerzita v Bratislave (ICO 00399957).

assertions.description: Output is valid JSON matching the network-mapper output schema
persons array contains at least Jan Sutiak and Filip Sobol
person_matrix section is present with headers and rows
Ran SQL to check if foaf-connected companies also contract with the same buyer
connections array populated (even if empty, must exist)
summary section with suppliers_checked, persons_found, connections_found

evals.prompt: Check RPVS registration for DREVEX s.r.o. (ICO 36835463) using rpvs phase only. Context: threshold gaming flag, 912K EUR in public contracts.

assertions.description: Output is valid JSON matching the network-mapper output schema
rpvs array has entry for ICO 36835463 with registered status (true/false)
If registered: ubos array with names. If not: registered=false noted.
Does not fabricate person connections that weren't found in RPVS
summary section with rpvs_registered count

evals.prompt: Cross-reference YEMANITY s.r.o. supplier profile and network data. Identify patterns across contracts, flags, and persons. Classify findings as CONFIRMED/INCONCLUSIVE/DISMISSED.

assertions.description: Output is valid JSON matching the cross-referencer output schema
Identifies systematic NACE mismatch — consulting firm doing construction across ALL contracts, not just individual flag
Notes that 1-employee firm handling 892K EUR is a capacity red flag
All findings classified as CONFIRMED, INCONCLUSIVE, or DISMISSED
Does not invent network connections not present in the input data
Computes combined contract value and/or combined flag count across the pattern
summary section includes risk_level and confirmed/inconclusive/dismissed counts

evals.prompt: Cross-reference DREVEX s.r.o. supplier profile with RPVS data. Focus on threshold gaming pattern and buyer concentration with Obec Liptovske Sliace.

assertions.description: Output is valid JSON matching the cross-referencer output schema
Identifies that dodatok reduced amount to just below EU threshold — not just flagging the number but explaining the implication
Notes 3 of 4 contracts from same buyer as a pattern, not just individual observation
Considers whether buyer concentration could be innocent (rural municipality, limited suppliers) before confirming
All findings classified using the framework
Does not fabricate financial data, connections, or UVO results not in the input

evals.prompt: Decide whether to proceed from sql-analytics to critical-validation. Findings: 12 total (2 DANGER: YEMANITY NACE mismatch 892K, DREVEX threshold gaming 213K; 5 WARNING; 5 INFO). No findings dismissed yet.

assertions.description: Decision is GO — there are 12 findings including DANGER-level that need validation
Output matches phase-gater schema with decision, rationale, suppliers_to_include
Rationale references the DANGER-level findings as justification
suppliers_to_include contains both 55002072 and 36835463

evals.prompt: Decide whether to proceed from critical-validation to finstat-enrichment. Findings: 8 total, all DISMISSED. Reasons: 3x ministry dotacie (normal budget allocations), 2x SFRB housing loans, 2x freelancer micro-contracts (STVR), 1x round amount grant.

assertions.description: Decision is STOP — all findings were dismissed, no CONFIRMED or INCONCLUSIVE to enrich
Output matches phase-gater schema
Rationale notes that all findings were dismissed/innocent
suppliers_to_include is empty array or null

evals.prompt: Decide whether to proceed from critical-validation to rpvs-lookup. Findings: 3 CONFIRMED findings, but all suppliers have contracts under 50K EUR (largest is 48,500 EUR). No DANGER-level findings.

assertions.description: Decision is STOP — RPVS is not legally required for contracts under 100K EUR, and all are under 50K
Output matches phase-gater schema
Rationale references the 100K EUR RPVS threshold
